visual_evidence: The four stage labels are readable: USD / MDL, noMDL, VLM Checks, and InternNav.
The VLM target label reads Target: box; the v17 failure label Target: boy is not present.
The stage-3 matched-render block, target-box icon, robot/question/pointing motif, and stage-4 SR/SPL/NE metric tiles are visually legible at source scale.
The figure remains schematic roadmap art, not empirical render, VLM-output, material-effect, or navigation evidence.
decision: Promote v18 over v16 because it keeps the low-text four-stage story, preserves the required target label, uses the clearer VLM Checks title, and avoids the v17 wrong-target text.
claim_boundary: Use only as AI-generated schematic roadmap. Empirical claims remain tied to recorded project artifacts, real render figures, tables, and logs.
